_comment: Ground-truth eval corpus. 'verified': human-confirmed text (matching is punctuation/case-insensitive, see eval_truth.py). 'known_wrong': the listed text was human-flagged WRONG with no replacement given - a model outputting it fails, but differing is only weak evidence of being right. 'unresolved': feedback given but never pinned to a wem_id. Grow all three as feedback arrives; score with eval_truth.py.
